text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
116 
INGRDNT_CST_PD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Ingredient Cost Paid Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the amount paid by Medicaid or the managed care plan on this claim or 
adjustment at the claim detail level towards the cost of ingredients for the prescription or drug. 
SHORT NAME: INGRDNT_CST_PD_AMT 
LONG NAME: INGRDNT_CST_PD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF)
